use std::sync::{Arc, Mutex, Weak};

struct Node {
    value: i64,
    // GOOD: Weak reference breaks the cycle
    parent: Option<Weak<Mutex<Node>>>,
    children: Vec<Arc<Mutex<Node>>>,
}

fn build_tree() -> Arc<Mutex<Node>> {
    let root = Arc::new(Mutex::new(Node {
        value: 0,
        parent: None,
        children: Vec::new(),
    }));

    let child = Arc::new(Mutex::new(Node {
        value: 1,
        parent: Some(Arc::downgrade(&root)),
        children: Vec::new(),
    }));

    root.lock().unwrap().children.push(Arc::clone(&child));
    root
}
